SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.template.impl

Class JpaTemplateImpl

java.lang.Object
st.orm.core.template.impl.JpaTemplateImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
QueryFactory, JpaTemplate, TemplateDecorator
public final class JpaTemplateImpl extends Object implements JpaTemplate, QueryFactory

  • Method Details

    • query

      public jakarta.persistence.Query query(@Nonnull TemplateString template)
      Creates a query for the specified query template.
      Specified by:
      query in interface JpaTemplate
      Parameters:
      template - the query template.
      Returns:
      the query.

    • sqlTemplate

      public SqlTemplate sqlTemplate()
      Get the SQL template used by this factory.

      Query factory implementations must ensure that the SQL Template returned by this method is processed by any registered SqlInterceptor instances before being returned. As a result, this method is expected to return a new instance of the SQL template each time it is called, ensuring that any modifications made by interceptors are applied correctly.

      Specified by:
      sqlTemplate in interface QueryFactory
      Returns:
      the SQL template.
      Since:
      1.3

    • createBindVars

      public BindVars createBindVars()
      Create a new bind variables instance that can be used to add bind variables to a batch.
      Specified by:
      createBindVars in interface QueryFactory
      Returns:
      a new bind variables instance.

      public Query create(@Nonnull TemplateString template)
      Description copied from interface: QueryFactory
      Create a new query for the specified template.
      Specified by:
      create in interface QueryFactory
      Parameters:
      template - the template to process.
      Returns:
      a query that can be executed.
